meaning: 绂忓窞[绂忓缓鐪乚(鏃ц瘧Foochow)
examples: Students at a primary school in Fuzhou, China's Fujian Province were required to clean the school toilets to help them develop good habits.
Zuo died the next September in Fuzhou.
Their next stop would be a reunion with relatives in Fuzhou.
It was bound for Fuzhou, fourteen hundred miles away.
